jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at 99acres - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? 99acres in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About 99acres:
99acres is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres!
